info.title: containr api
info.description: containr paas api for managing services, deployments, and infrastructure

post.summary: create a new local user as the bootstrap admin
register a new user with email/password

get.summary: list all buckets for the authenticated user
get a single bucket by id
get s3 connection details for a bucket
get github app status and installations
handles the github app manifest callback
generates the github app manifest and returns the creation url
get repos from github app installations
Get certificate status for a service

post.summary: Trigger certificate reissue for a service

400.description: deployments not supported for this service
deployments not supported for this service

deployments not supported for this service
http request logs not supported for this service
settings not supported for this service

configured.description: whether a github app is configured

registration_open.description: whether the first account can still be registered publicly

SettingsResponse.description: settings response - only exposes safe fields

dashboard_url.description: dashboard url served by the proxy

default_service_domain_pattern.description: default hostname pattern used for public services

log_retention_days.description: number of days rotated logs are retained (0 disables cleanup)

public_ip.description: public ip used for direct port access and domain validation

service_wildcard_domain.description: wildcard suffix used for default service subdomains

storage_internal_host.description: rustfs hostname exposed on the shared docker network

storage_management_endpoint.description: rustfs endpoint used by containr for management operations

storage_public_hostname.description: optional public s3 hostname routed to rustfs

wildcard_dns.description: wildcard dns readiness for default service hostnames

log_retention_days.description: number of days rotated logs are retained (0 disables cleanup)

public_ip.description: public ip used for direct access and domain validation

storage_internal_host.description: rustfs hostname exposed on the shared docker network

storage_management_endpoint.description: rustfs endpoint used by containr for management operations

is_admin.description: whether this user can manage server settings and users

WildcardDomainStatusResponse.description: wildcard dns readiness for default service domains

detail.description: human-readable explanation of the current state

ready.description: whether the current wildcard dns setup appears ready

sample_domain.description: sample default service hostname checked against dns

wildcard_domain.description: wildcard domain admins should configure in dns
